visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in a bright, warehouse-style retail environment, wearing a black beret and a brown off-the-shoulder shirt. She holds a long plastic package containing multiple grain-covered baguettes. In the background, pallets of muffins and other bakery goods are visible alongside distant shoppers. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of the bread package, highlighting the Eiffel Tower and Arc de Triomphe illustrations on the paper wrapping. The woman's hands point to the visible seeds and grains through the clear plastic. (3) The setting shifts to a domestic indoor living room. Two women sit behind a table; the primary woman holds the bread while her friend, wearing a patterned bucket hat, holds a piece of bread. They are framed in a medium shot with warm, soft lighting. (4) A close-up shot focuses on slices of the multi-grain bread arranged on a pink plate, showing the porous internal structure and the variety of seeds embedded in the crust.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你是從法國來的嗎. [Slogan]: 必買減肥神器 歐式高纖穀粒長棍. (2) [Subtitle]: 高纖穀粒長棍麵包 一看就滿滿的藜麥. (3) [Subtitle]: 藜麥對身體真的很棒. (4) [Subtitle]: 它撒滿了滿滿的穀物. (5) [Subtitle]: 感覺這個口感就會很酥脆. (6) [Subtitle]: 回去再試試看. (7) [Subtitle]: 當早餐應該不錯. (8) [Subtitle]: 四根299 一根不用75塊. (9) [Subtitle]: 回去試看哎. (10) [Subtitle]: 這個好適合你的造型哦. (11) [Subtitle]: 它比一般的法國的柔軟一些. (12) [Subtitle]: 好市多 減肥神器出現了. [Slogan]: 減肥神器出現了. (13) [Subtitle]: 戒不掉麵包 總是想吃白吐司 麵包怎麼辦呢. (14) [Subtitle]: 選比較健康. [Variety]: 👍. (15) [Slogan]: 歐式高纖穀粒長棍. (16) [Subtitle]: 這款好市多的 歐式高纖穀粒長棍麵包. (17) [Subtitle]: 它主要的成分是小麥粉 然後上面加了很多藜麥 南瓜籽 葵花籽. (18) [Subtitle]: 真的比你吃一般那種白吐司還要健康太多. (19) [Subtitle]: 它血糖也不會讓你升得那麼快. (20) [Subtitle]: 這個呢 你切一切直接吃可以. (21) [Subtitle]: 但是烤過更好吃 會外酥內軟. (22) [Subtitle]: 然後你咬進去 就是那種鹹香鹹香的穀粒味. (23) [Subtitle]: 你可以 不沾任何東西直接吃 也可以配著濃湯喝. (24) [Slogan]: 丹麥 輕打發起司醬. (25) [Subtitle]: 或者是買這個 丹麥輕打發起司醬. (26) [Subtitle]: 也是好市多的 非常地搭. (27) [Subtitle]: 這個搭起來 完全就是外面高級西餐廳那種 餐前麵包的水準. (28) [Subtitle]: 這個乳酪醬配這個歐式長棍麵包 嚇死人的好吃. (29) [Subtitle]: 世界無敵好吃. (30) [Subtitle]: 想要不要那麼胖的話 就只單吃這個. (31) [Subtitle]: 想要超級無敵好吃的話 配著這個吃嚇死人 太厲害了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper in mask in background, 1 blurred person in background bakery area.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long black hair, wearing a black KANGOL beret and a brown off-the-shoulder sheer shirt. Another woman with short hair wearing a patterned black and white bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco wholesale warehouse with industrial shelves and bakery products. Second scene is a clean, modern home interior with a table and domestic lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo acoustic guitar strumming paired with a bright synth melody establishes a cheerful mood. A youthful female voice speaks with high energy and rising intonation, asking a playful question about the product's origin. (2) A distinct plastic crinkling sound (SFX) occurs as the bread bag is manipulated. A male narrator's voice enters, exhibiting clear articulation and professional broadcast-style compression, excitedly highlighting the product's value. (3) The background ambiance shifts from a subtle warehouse hum to a dryer, closer room tone. The primary female voice continues her description with a friendly, persuasive tone, while a second female voice adds brief, higher-pitched exclamations of agreement. (4) Short, percussive thudding sounds (SFX) are audible as items are placed on a table. The male narrator speeds up his delivery, emphasizing the ingredients and health benefits with high vocal arousal as the guitar-driven BGM continues uninterrupted.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Value Proposition -> Proof of Quality -> Serving Suggestion -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To recommend Costco's multi-grain baguettes as a healthy, cost-effective weight-loss friendly food option, specifically highlighting their ingredients and pairing them with a specific cheese spread for a premium dining experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Reviewing specific branded items from Costco and suggesting high value for money.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of variety-show style text overlays and dual-gender narration to maintain high engagement while conveying nutritional information.
